sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111035" key="filippe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλιππ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n111035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be fond of horses,</tr_> Theodos.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.37</biblScope> </bibl> G.</sense> </entryFree>
